input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

final_answer: All Low Voltage Batteries and onboard power supplies must be securely mounted inside the Chassis below the height of the Shoulder Belt Mount T.2.6
